title: 0.5 M EDTA (0.5 L)
author: Haven Himmighoefer

steps_raw.instruction: Fill 0.5 L bottle with 300mL of deionized water.
Add 95.05 g of Ethylenediamine Tetraacetic Acid Disodium Salt Dihydrate to the water and mix. The pH will be about 3 at this points. The pH needs to be at 8.
Add NaOH pellets until the pH is at 8. This will be about 105 pellets. Can check if at 8 with pH machine or with pH paper.
Once at pH 8, fill to 500 mL.
Autoclave under setting 12 with water in the container to prevent over boiling.
